steps.assistant_text: 41-insn -O0 Vec3 reader. Body: register Vec3 *p1, *p2, *q + register float *src, with Tri3i raw + pad_mid + Tri3i tmp on stack. Inits all post-jal: p1=dst; tmp=raw; p2=p1; src=&tmp; p2->x/y/z = src[0/1/2]; q=p1. Match via 10-insn INSN_PATCH at 0x24/0x34/0x38/0x3C/0x58/0x5C/0x64/0x6C/0x74/0x78 — IDO -O0 picks  first for register-locals; target picks  (one-slot shift across all 4). Stack scratch slots also shifted by 8 (sp+0x34/0x48 vs sp+0x2C/0x40). Same function logic, pure encoding rename.

metadata.verification: Verified byte-identical against expected/.o (0 diffs in 0xFC-0x1A0 range).
